title: Craftable Music Discs (Create)
body:
# Craft Music Discs!

## Added items:

blank music disk (press zinc ingot with a press and depot)

Needle (recipe: 2 iron, 1 diamond, in a diagonal shape on the crafting table diamond in bottom left of crafting table.)

## Implemented discs:

Pigstep (recipe: guilded blackstone, needle, blank music disk)

Blocks (recipe: any stone, needle, blank music disk)

Cat (recipe: string, needle, blank music disk)

Chirp (recipe: feather, needle, blank music disk)

Otherside (recipe: noteblock, needle, blank music disk, any stone)

Disc 13 (recipe: gunpowder, needle, blank music disk)

Far (recipe: block of amethyst, needle, blank music disk)

Wait (recipe: jukebox, needle, blank music disk)

Ward (recipe: gravel, needle, blank music disk)

Strad (recipe: loom, needle, blank music disk)

Stal (recipe: block of copper, needle, blank music disk)

Mall (recipe: glass, needle, blank music disk)

Mellohi (recipe: any wood, needle, blank music disk, noteblock)

Relic (recipe: block of redstone, needle, blank music disk)

Disc 11 (recipe: cracked stone bricks, needle, blank music disk)
